overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush tribal settlement and surrounding wilderness. The clip shows movement from elevated bamboo walkways through a village, past a large wooden archway, and along riverside mountain trails with cinematic lighting and detailed vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bamboo walkway through tropical settlement

events.description: descends from elevated bamboo walkway to ground level

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the bamboo walkway through the village area, passing tribal structures

entered.detail: elevated walkway constructed from bamboo poles and wooden planks
structure with orange fabric roofing and wooden supports
tall palm tree trunk with visible roots
rustic wooden support structures and platforms

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated bamboo walkway through a tropical tribal settlement. Orange fabric canopies and wooden scaffolding line the path, with palm trees and dense vegetation surrounding the area. The lighting is diffused through the canopy as the character descends toward ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open trail approaching decorative tribal archway

events.description: exits bamboo walkway onto open dirt ground, leaving the village area
passes through the large wooden tribal archway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path approaching and passing through the ornate wooden archway

entered.detail: reddish-brown dirt trail winding through grassy terrain
large decorative archway made of wood and bone with hanging ornaments
distant snow-capped mountains visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village, the character transitions onto an open dirt path under bright sunlight. The scene opens up to reveal a large ornate tribal archway ahead, with distant mountains visible in the background. The character walks through the archway, marking the transition from the settlement to the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with river views and red rock formations

events.description: river becomes visible to the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the open trail with mountains ahead and the river visible to the left

entered.detail: flowing river with clear water running alongside the trail
large reddish rock formations and cliffs
cluster of pine trees on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Beyond the archway, the trail opens into a wide valley with panoramic mountain views. A river appears on the left, flowing alongside the path through red rock formations. Pine trees dot the landscape as the character continues along the dirt trail toward the distant peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside path with geothermal mist and waterfalls

events.description: entering misty area with steam rising from the river and rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating the rocky path alongside the misty river with steam rising from the water

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground with boulders and stone outcrops
waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face
white mist and steam rising from the warm river water

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes rocky as the character approaches the river's edge, where mist rises from the water suggesting geothermal activity. Waterfalls cascade down the red rock cliffs, and the path winds through boulders and steam. The lighting becomes more diffused as the character moves into the misty riverside area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the sheltered interior of a tropical tribal settlement into a vast, misty mountain wilderness. It begins on an elevated bamboo walkway lined with orange fabric canopies and wooden scaffolding, moving through dense vegetation as the character descends toward ground level. As the character leaves the village, the scene opens onto a sun-drenched dirt path that leads through a large ornate tribal archway, shifting the view toward distant peaks. The trail then expands into a wide valley where a river flows alongside red rock formations and pine trees before turning toward the water's edge. Finally, the landscape becomes rocky and the lighting softens as the camera moves into a geothermal area filled with rising steam and waterfalls cascading down cliffs.
